name: finit
description: Fast init for Linux. Cookies included
readme_summary: Finit is a fast, simple init system for Linux, designed as an alternative to SysV init and systemd, particularly for small and embedded systems. It aims to provide a lightweight and efficient boot process.
key_features: Alternative to SysV init and systemd
Designed for small and embedded Linux systems
Can run on desktop and server systems
primary_use_case: To provide a lightweight and efficient process supervisor and init system for Linux, especially in embedded environments.
cover_image_prompt: A minimalist, stylized engine starting up, with clean lines and a glowing core. Instead of traditional gears, it uses abstract data streams and light particles flowing smoothly to initiate a small, sleek digital device. The engine itself is labeled 'finit' in a subtle, futuristic font. The background is a clean, dark gradient with subtle circuit board patterns. The overall mood is efficient and modern, emphasizing speed and simplicity. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear iconography and a limited, cool color palette, conveying a sense of streamlined power and boot-up speed.

name: network-management-client
description: A Meshtastic desktop client, allowing simple, offline deployment and administration of an ad-hoc mesh communication network. Built in Rust and TypeScript.
readme_summary: This repository provides a desktop client for managing Meshtastic devices, enabling users to administer large, decentralized mesh networks. It focuses on network-level management and analysis, offering insights into connections and network health.
key_features: Management of large, decentralized mesh networks
Support for USB, IP, and Bluetooth connections
primary_use_case: To provide users with a comprehensive desktop application for managing and analyzing Meshtastic mesh networks, offering insights beyond single-node management.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old cartographer meticulously drawing a complex, interconnected map of a hidden city. Instead of traditional ink, the cartographer uses glowing threads of light that connect various points on the map, representing data flowing between nodes in a mesh network. Small, stylized Meshtastic devices are subtly integrated into the map's landmarks. In the background, a large, intricate blueprint shows the underlying network structure, with small UI elements displaying connection status and data packets. The scene is set in a cozy, dimly lit study filled with ancient scrolls and modern screens, conveying a sense of both established knowledge and cutting-edge technology. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a warm, inviting color palette and a focus on intricate detail.

name: StoryGen-Atelier
description: AI-assisted storyboard and video generation tool. Uses Gemini for generating storyboard text and frames, Vertex AI Veo for generating transition clips, and ffmpeg for stitching the final video. Built-in logs and gallery management.
readme_summary: StoryGen Atelier is an AI-powered tool that automates the creation of storyboards and videos. It leverages Google's Gemini for script and frame generation, Vertex AI's Veo model for video clip synthesis, and FFmpeg for final video assembly, incorporating features like logs and gallery management.
key_features: AI-assisted storyboard generation using Gemini (text and image models)
Automated video generation by calling Vertex AI Veo for clips
Video stitching using FFmpeg with quality preservation
Integrated logs dashboard for tracking video and storyboard generation
Gallery for managing saved storyboards and videos
Built-in prompt guide for AI model interaction
primary_use_case: Automated generation of storyboards and video content using AI models and video processing tools.
cover_image_prompt: A digital artist's studio where a magical quill pen (representing Gemini) is rapidly sketching out a comic-style storyboard panel by panel onto a large digital canvas. As each panel is completed, a beam of light (representing Vertex AI Veo) emanates from the canvas, transforming the static image into a short, dynamic video clip. These clips then flow like a river into a sophisticated editing suite (representing FFmpeg) where they are seamlessly stitched together into a final, polished movie reel. Subtle UI elements showing AI prompts and video timelines are visible on floating screens in the background. The style is a vibrant, 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic.

name: jarvis
description: A 100% private AI voice assistant that lives on your computer (works offline). Talk naturally as if Jarvis is a third person in the room, and get conversational responses. It remembers everything, knows location and time, can check the web, control Chrome, track nutrition, and more with support for unlimited MCPs / tools without context rot.
readme_summary: Jarvis is a 100% private, offline AI voice assistant that runs locally on your computer. It allows for natural conversational interaction, remembers context, and can integrate with various tools and applications without sending data to the cloud.
key_features: Privacy-focused with automatic sensitive data redaction
primary_use_case: A private, always-on AI assistant for everyday tasks and conversations that respects user data privacy.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic robot assistant (Jarvis) sitting comfortably in a cozy home office, actively listening to a person speaking. The robot has subtle glowing lines connecting it to various icons representing its capabilities: a magnifying glass for web search, a book for memory, a computer screen for screen reading, and a fork and knife for nutrition tracking. Digital particles representing data flow are contained entirely within the robot's local environment, visualized as a transparent bubble around it, emphasizing its offline and private nature. The background is warm and inviting, with a soft glow emanating from the robot. The art style is a 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a focus on conveying helpfulness and privacy.
